title: tulipa suaveolens var. passeriniana
intro: Tulipa suaveolens var. passeriniana, also known as the 'Passerina Tulip', is a type of flowering bulbous plant that belongs to the Tulipa genus. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its bulb, which is used to treat various health issues due to its high content of alkaloids, glycosides, and saponins. The health benefits of Tulipa suaveolens var. passeriniana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. Tulipa suaveolens var. passeriniana can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal use.
